title: Oral and Dental Health Mission and Vision
content:
Oral and Dental Health Mission and Vision

Mission

Mission of the Oral and Dental Health Program; In accordance with the rules required by the qualified, competent, professional knowledge, transferring the basic information required for the development and protection of oral and dental health awareness to the patient, as well as the authority and ability to use clinical devices under the supervision of the dentist, authorized to perform preventive dentistry practices, oral cavity and jaw to train technical staff who can assist the dentist during the treatment of their illnesses and can adapt to other healthcare personnel.

Vision

To educate respected staff who have reached the international level of knowledge in the field of Oral and Dental Health, preferred in the public and private sectors, adhere to ethical rules.
